interfaces.name: Habit
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Habit { @Attribute(.unique) var id: UUID; var name: String; var unitLabel: String; var dailyQuantity: Double; var costPerUnit: Decimal; var createdAt: Date; var streakStartAt: Date; var cleanDaysBeforeCurrentStreak: Int; var rateEffectiveFrom: Date; var cumulativeSavingsBeforeRateChange: Decimal; var lifetimeCravingsSurvived: Int; var lastShownMilestoneThreshold: Int?; var lastInteractedAt: Date; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade, inverse: \RelapseEvent.habit) var relapseEvents: [RelapseEvent]; @Relationship(deleteRule: .cascade, inverse: \CravingSession.habit) var cravingSessions: [CravingSession] }
interfaces.notes: N habits supported unconditionally from day one; only UI/entitlement layer enforces the one-habit-free gate. streakStartAt is non-optional (initialized to createdAt, overwritten to now on relapse) so no nullable-branch duplication at call sites. cleanDaysBeforeCurrentStreak + cumulativeSavingsBeforeRateChange are forward-only accumulators, same pattern applied to both days and money.

interfaces.name: RelapseEvent
interfaces.signature: @Model final class RelapseEvent { @Attribute(.unique) var id: UUID; var timestamp: Date; var streakLengthAtReset: Int; var savingsAtReset: Decimal; var habit: Habit? }
interfaces.notes: Immutable historical row, timestamp always now (no backdating). Written by RelapseViewModel in the same ModelContext save that updates Habit.streakStartAt/cleanDaysBeforeCurrentStreak. Substantiates the Milestones/history tab.

interfaces.name: CravingSession
interfaces.signature: @Model final class CravingSession { @Attribute(.unique) var id: UUID; var startedAt: Date; var completedAt: Date?; var outcome: CravingOutcome; var habit: Habit? }
interfaces.notes: outcome starts .active. Creating a new session for a habit force-resolves any existing active session for that habit to .abandoned first — at most one active session per habit by construction.

interfaces.name: CravingOutcome
interfaces.signature: enum CravingOutcome: String, Codable { case active, completed, abandoned }
interfaces.notes: Persisted, not runtime-inferred, so relaunch resolution, duplicate-session resolution, and completion all read/write the same field.

interfaces.name: StreakEngine
interfaces.signature: enum StreakEngine { static func currentStreakDays(streakStartAt: Date, now: Date, calendar: Calendar) -> Int; static func lifetimeDaysFree(cleanDaysBeforeCurrentStreak: Int, streakStartAt: Date, now: Date, calendar: Calendar) -> Int }
interfaces.notes: Pure, stateless, injectable clock — no Date() or SwiftData calls internally. Result clamps to >= 0 for clock-skew (now < streakStartAt).

interfaces.name: SavingsEngine
interfaces.signature: enum SavingsEngine { static func currentSavings(cumulativeBeforeRateChange: Decimal, dailyQuantity: Double, costPerUnit: Decimal, rateEffectiveFrom: Date, now: Date, calendar: Calendar) -> Decimal; static func applyRateChange(existingSavings: Decimal, newDailyQuantity: Double, newCostPerUnit: Decimal, now: Date) -> (cumulativeBeforeRateChange: Decimal, rateEffectiveFrom: Date) }
interfaces.notes: applyRateChange called by HabitFormViewModel on save when quantity/cost changed; captures pre-edit savings as new baseline so forward-only recompute is structurally guaranteed.

interfaces.name: CravingSessionEngine
interfaces.signature: enum CravingSessionEngine { static let duration: TimeInterval = 90; static func remainingSeconds(startedAt: Date, now: Date) -> TimeInterval; static func resolveOnAppear(startedAt: Date, now: Date, currentOutcome: CravingOutcome) -> CravingOutcome }
interfaces.notes: resolveOnAppear never returns .completed from a stale/relaunch check (no retroactive credit) — only the live foreground countdown reaching zero while CravingTimerView is presented triggers an explicit .completed write, guarded to fire exactly once.

interfaces.name: MilestoneEngine
interfaces.signature: enum MilestoneEngine { static let thresholds: [Int] = [1, 3, 7, 30, 90, 180, 365]; static func nextUnshownThreshold(currentStreakDays: Int, lastShownThreshold: Int?) -> Int? }
interfaces.notes: Called from TodayViewModel.onAppearCheckMilestone; non-nil result triggers the milestone sheet exactly once per threshold via Habit.lastShownMilestoneThreshold.

interfaces.name: AppBootstrapState
interfaces.signature: enum AppBootstrapState: Equatable { case opening; case ready(ModelContainer); case failed(Error) }
interfaces.notes: Held in FreedayApp @State; constructed via explicit do/catch against FreedaySchemaV1 + FreedayMigrationPlan, never .modelContainer(for:). Branches root view before TabView exists.

interfaces.name: AppLevelErrorView
interfaces.signature: struct AppLevelErrorView: View { let error: Error; let retry: () -> Void }
interfaces.notes: Rendered instead of AppRootView when AppBootstrapState == .failed; plain-language copy + Try Again, no tab bar underneath.

interfaces.name: TodayViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable final class TodayViewModel { var habit: Habit?; var bootstrapState: AppBootstrapState; func startCravingSession(); func openRelapseFlow(); func onAppearCheckMilestone() -> Int? }
interfaces.notes: Reads via @Query, delegates all math to StreakEngine/SavingsEngine/MilestoneEngine — never computes calendar math inline.

interfaces.name: CravingTimerViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable final class CravingTimerViewModel { var session: CravingSession; func remaining(now: Date) -> TimeInterval; func handleAppear(now: Date); func dismissBeforeCompletion() }
interfaces.notes: handleAppear calls CravingSessionEngine.resolveOnAppear. Countdown may render via a simple Timer.publish(every: 1) for the first functional pass; TimelineView(.animation)-driven continuous rendering is an approved fast-follow polish pass, not a blocking requirement.

interfaces.name: RelapseViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable final class RelapseViewModel { var habit: Habit; var confirmed: Bool; func confirmRelapse() }
interfaces.notes: confirmRelapse writes RelapseEvent and updates streakStartAt/cleanDaysBeforeCurrentStreak in one ModelContext save, then flips confirmed for the in-place spring-animated state swap (same screen, no navigation).

interfaces.name: HabitFormViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable final class HabitFormViewModel { var name: String; var dailyQuantity: String; var costPerUnit: String; var isEditingExisting: Bool; var showsRecomputeDisclosure: Bool; func validate() -> Bool; func save() }
interfaces.notes: showsRecomputeDisclosure flips true only once a field differs from its originally loaded value. validate() rejects non-positive quantity/cost inline.

interfaces.name: EntitlementStore
interfaces.signature: @Observable final class EntitlementStore { var entitlementState: EntitlementState; func startTransactionListener() -> Task<Void, Never>; func refreshEntitlements() async; func purchase(_ product: Product) async throws; func restorePurchases() async throws }
interfaces.notes: startTransactionListener runs from FreedayApp init, kept alive for app lifetime. checkVerified failure hard-blocks entitlement, never soft-grants. refreshEntitlements re-scans Transaction.currentEntitlements on launch and on explicit Restore tap.

interfaces.name: HapticsService
interfaces.signature: enum HapticsService { static func notifySuccess(); static func notifyStreakDay() }
interfaces.notes: Internally checks CHHapticEngine.capabilitiesForHardware().supportsHaptics; absent hardware is a silent no-op, never an error path.

interfaces.name: MilestoneCardRenderer
interfaces.signature: enum MilestoneCardRenderer { static func renderImage(days: Int, savings: Decimal, colorScheme: ColorScheme) -> Image? }
interfaces.notes: Wraps ImageRenderer at a fixed capped type size (deliberate exception to live Dynamic Type), feeds ShareLink's Transferable payload.

interfaces.name: MilestoneCardView
interfaces.signature: struct MilestoneCardView: View { let days: Int; let savings: Decimal; let habitName: String }
interfaces.notes: Dual-purpose: rendered live in the sheet and passed to MilestoneCardRenderer.renderImage for export.

interfaces.name: Tokens
interfaces.signature: enum Tokens { enum Gradient { static let mintTop: Color; static let skyBottom: Color; static let posterMintTop: Color; static let posterSkyBottom: Color }; enum Spacing { static let xs: CGFloat; static let s: CGFloat; static let m: CGFloat; static let l: CGFloat; static let xl: CGFloat }; enum Radius { static let component: CGFloat; static let card: CGFloat; static let sheet: CGFloat } }
interfaces.notes: Concrete values from design_handoff: mint #B9F2DE to sky #8ED0F0, poster gradient #7EE8C3 to #6BB8F0, radii 12/20/28.

interfaces.name: SunriseCounterMotif
interfaces.signature: struct SunriseCounterMotif: View { let streakDays: Int; var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Single accessibilityElement with label stating the real day count (e.g. '47 days free'), never decorative-only. Gradient tone shifts with streakDays.

interfaces.name: FreedaySchemaV1
interfaces.signature: enum FreedaySchemaV1: VersionedSchema { static var models: [any PersistentModel.Type] { get }; static var versionIdentifier: Schema.Version { get } }
interfaces.notes: Stood up from first commit even though initial migration plan is trivial.

interfaces.name: FreedayMigrationPlan
interfaces.signature: enum FreedayMigrationPlan: SchemaMigrationPlan { static var schemas: [any VersionedSchema.Type] { get }; static var stages: [MigrationStage] { get } }
interfaces.notes: Pre-provisioned migration scaffolding paired with FreedaySchemaV1.

interfaces.name: MilestonesListViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable final class MilestonesListViewModel { var habit: Habit?; var earnedMilestones: [RelapseEvent]; var isLoading: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Backs the Milestones/history tab — chronological substantiation list only, not a journal. Empty/loading/success/error states.

interfaces.name: PaywallViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable final class PaywallViewModel { var entitlementState: EntitlementState; func purchase(_ product: Product) async; func restore() async }
interfaces.notes: Triggered before any second-habit setup field renders. verificationFailed state hard-blocks with explicit copy, never a silent timeout.

interfaces.name: SettingsViewModel
interfaces.signature: @Observable final class SettingsViewModel { var habits: [Habit]; var entitlementState: EntitlementState; func deleteHabit(_ habit: Habit); func restore() async }
interfaces.notes: deleteHabit relies on Habit's declarative cascade delete rule — no manual cascade logic here.

interfaces.name: EntitlementState
interfaces.signature: enum EntitlementState: Equatable { case unknown, free, pro, expired, revoked, verificationFailed }
interfaces.notes: expired vs revoked distinction needed for the subscription-lapse read-only rule (data preserved, most-recently-active habit stays interactive).

errors: block #1 in `interfaces-json` has no closing fence
